title: Oggzil
content:
{{Top|leg}}
An '''oggzil''' was a [[biot]] used by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. Developed to communicate with technology found in [[The galaxy/Legends|the known galaxy]], oggzils would be attached to [[villip]]s, so that the Yuuzhan Vong would not need to use "dead" machines. They ate a metal-rich diet, resulting in metallic substances depositing along its vertebrae, creating the antenna effect.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]''
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant]]''
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic III: Reunion]]''
